summary: Complete testing of Jurisdiction Onboarding feature. All 9 test cases passed: Login successful, onboarding overlay appears on first jurisdiction switch, Step 1 shows correct Belgian content (flag, title, 3 educational cards for Housing/Employment/Debt), Next button advances to Step 2, Step 2 shows 'How Archer adapts' with 3 cards (Legal references/Languages/Jurisdiction awareness), 'Got it — let's go' dismisses overlay, localStorage remembers seen jurisdictions (onboarding doesn't show again), X button also dismisses and saves to localStorage. Code review confirmed content exists for both BE and US jurisdictions in EN/FR/NL.

1_login_dashboard_loads.evidence: Login with test@archer.legal / ArcherPro2026! successful, dashboard loads

2_clear_localstorage_switch_belgium_onbo.evidence: After clearing localStorage key 'archer_jurisdiction_onboarded', switching to Belgium triggers onboarding overlay (data-testid='jurisdiction-onboarding')

3_step1_belgian_content.evidence: Step 1 shows Belgian flag 🇧🇪, 'Welcome to Belgian Law' title, 3 educational cards: Housing (bail locatif, 3-month deposit max), Employment (CDI/CDD contracts), Debt (mise en demeure process)

5_step2_how_archer_adapts.evidence: Step 2 shows 'How Archer adapts' with 3 cards: Legal references (Belgian codes), Three official languages (French/Dutch/German), Jurisdiction-aware (Walloon/Flemish/Brussels)

6_got_it_button_dismisses.evidence: 'Got it — let's go' button dismisses overlay, localStorage updated to {"BE":true}

7_localstorage_remembers_no_repeat.evidence: After dismissal, switching US→Belgium again does NOT show onboarding (localStorage remembers)

8_x_button_dismisses_and_saves.evidence: X button (data-testid='close-onboarding') dismisses overlay and saves to localStorage

9_code_review_multilingual_content.evidence: JurisdictionOnboarding.js contains content for both BE and US jurisdictions in EN/FR/NL (3 language versions each)

JurisdictionOnboarding.js.structure: Well-structured 2-step overlay component with STEPS object containing content for BE and US in en/fr/nl
JurisdictionOnboarding.js.localStorage_handling: Proper implementation with hasSeenOnboarding() and markOnboardingSeen() functions using 'archer_jurisdiction_onboarded' key
JurisdictionOnboarding.js.data_testids: All required data-testid attributes present: jurisdiction-onboarding, onboarding-next-btn, close-onboarding

content_verification.BE_en: Welcome to Belgian Law - Housing/Employment/Debt + How Archer adapts
content_verification.BE_fr: Bienvenue dans le droit belge - Logement/Emploi/Dettes + Comment Archer s'adapte
content_verification.BE_nl: Welkom bij Belgisch recht - Huur/Arbeid/Schulden + Hoe Archer zich aanpast
content_verification.US_en: Welcome to US Law - Housing/Employment/Debt + How Archer adapts
content_verification.US_fr: Bienvenue dans le droit américain - Logement/Emploi/Dettes + Comment Archer s'adapte
content_verification.US_nl: Welkom bij Amerikaans recht - Huur/Arbeid/Schulden + Hoe Archer zich aanpast

Dashboard.js.integration: handleJurisdictionSwitch correctly checks hasSeenOnboarding(j) before showing onboarding via setOnboarding(j)
Dashboard.js.import: Properly imports JurisdictionOnboarding and hasSeenOnboarding from components

critical_code_review_comments: JurisdictionOnboarding.js is well-implemented with proper 2-step flow, localStorage tracking, and multilingual support
All data-testid attributes are correctly placed for testing
Content is comprehensive and jurisdiction-specific (Belgian law mentions bail locatif, CDI/CDD, mise en demeure; US law mentions at-will employment, FDCPA, state-specific laws)
Step indicator shows progress visually with colored bars
X button and 'Got it' button both properly call markOnboardingSeen() before closing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Jurisdiction onboarding feature fully implemented and tested. The onboarding shows only on FIRST switch to a new jurisdiction. localStorage key 'archer_jurisdiction_onboarded' stores JSON object like {BE: true, US: true}. The test user (test@archer.legal) has US jurisdiction by default. To test onboarding, clear localStorage first with page.evaluate('localStorage.removeItem("archer_jurisdiction_onboarded")'), then switch jurisdiction. Both US and Belgian onboarding content available in EN/FR/NL.
